html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Jennifer’s major stress period has resolved, yet her hair remains in that quiet “stabilization” stage — shedding isn’t worsening, but new growth still feels distant. This protocol focuses on steadying her body’s reset by securing deeper sleep and restoring daily calm, while rebuilding protein and omega-3 foundations her follicles rely on. Each week reinforces stability so the scalp can safely shift from pausing to sprouting. 🌱 With the triggers behind her, this is about momentum and trust — the groundwork for visible regrowth is forming.

Consistency now sets the stage for visible regrowth.
